regional_cost_note: Bricklayers in Hamilton typically charge $125–$190/m² for single-skin brickwork, $115–$170/m² for blockwork, and $210–$420/m² for heritage restoration. Waikato rates are generally 10–15% below Auckland for most trades. Brick is less common in NZ new builds but remains popular for retaining walls, paving, and heritage restoration.
